string.text: Bat

An artifact whose magnetic properties resemble heavy metals and like them it has a low specific heat capacity. It creates a powerful protective field which changes the trajectory of bullets and other projectiles. The artifact is very rare and has a high value. It’s only the downside is that it’s radioactive.
 %c[default]Properties:
%c[255,238,153,26]• %c[default]Bulletproof %c[255,238,15,26](%c[255,1,128,54]+7%c[255,238,15,26])
%c[default]
Fireloop

A very rare artifact which is only created near powerful burner anomalies. It can lower the heat of any object in a 5 meter radius and thus makes it impervious to heat anomalies. On top of that the artifact slightly decreases the time in which wounds heal.
Fountain

Despite not having any gravitational effects, this artifact makes the user’s gear lighter. According to one of the theories made by scientists, this effect is achieved because of the artifact’s low volumetric mass density. Although unexplainable, the fact the artifact stays on the ground and doesn’t float up in the air is what puzzles people.
Generator
Not only does this artifact help the body stop bleeding but it also helps the body regenerate itself. The only downside is that it’s radioactive.
Dragon Eye

This artifact has the ability to strengthen its user’s muscles as well as stabilize its user’s breathing. Additional effects included: strengthening of protein synthesis and an increase in the effectiveness of bodily enzymes. The full effects of this artifact on the body aren’t known yet since scientists have not fully studied it. Emits radiation.
Peas

A strong chemical structure of a new era that is able to detoxify its user from any form of radiation, no matter what the source is. Be it water, food or air, it doesn’t matter. The artifact does this by capturing each radioactive particle and moving it out of the body. Scientists believe that this is artifact is completely nontoxic.
Cell

This artifact’s powerful gravitational pull is both its strength and weakness. On one hand it changes the trajectory of incoming bullets and other projectiles and thus protects the user. On the other hand though, its gravitational pull makes the user’s gear and loot a lot heavier. Another downside is that it’s radioactive.
 %c[default]Properties:
%c[255,238,153,26]• %c[default]Bulletproof %c[255,238,15,26](%c[255,1,128,54]+10%c[255,238,15,26])
%c[default]
Cocoon

The properties of this artifact can be called “stoppers”. This artifact has two sources of energy, when combined together, make an energy field which creates a different atmosphere inside it. This atmosphere is a lot denser and thus stops blunt forces attacks as well as other attacks. This artifact also produces radiation.
 %c[default]Properties:
%c[255,238,153,26]• %c[default]Bulletproof %c[255,238,15,26](%c[255,1,128,54]+12%c[255,238,15,26])
%c[default]
Beacon

A structure made out of a highly dense substance. When this artifact is put in a dangerous environment, it produces a purifying gas cloud that lessens the effects of toxic gasses and radiation on the user.
Medallion

This artifact is structured like a hoop with four triangular objects on the sides. Even though these objects are constantly in motion, they are always positioned symmetrically to each other. These four bits produce an energy which, when it comes in contact with a living creature, it heals its wounds, restores its energy, and rids their body of radiation. This artifact is very valuable due to its effectiveness and scarcity.
Tapeworm

Even though this artifact looks like regular silicone dioxide, its atomic mass is completely different. The artifact doesn’t only differ with its atomic mass, but also by the type of electricity it produces, which shields its user from an electrical shock. It’s only downside is that it’s radioactive.
Black Angel

This artifact can be the difference between life and death in places with high psi-radiation. The Black Angel artifact produces an anti psi-radiation which restores the chemical balances of the brain, as well as any lost brain cells. Not only does the artifact protect its user from psi-emission, but it also treats any existing mental illnesses.
Signet

Stalkers also call this artifact a “Signet’. This artifact protects its user by strengthening any armor he or she wearing. The artifact affects all metals in its surrounding by prolonging their durability. The artifact also makes weapons more reliable.
 %c[default]Properties:
%c[255,238,153,26]• %c[default]Bulletproof %c[255,238,15,26](%c[255,1,128,54]+3%c[255,238,15,26])
%c[default]
Phantom

This anomalous formation consists of a plasma like substance inside a pulsating shell. This artifact’s main specialty is its ability to absorb oxygen and thus reduce the effects of burns on the body. It also has a small healing effect. Despite it positive qualities though, it is radioactive.
Gimlet

This artifact is a type of plant whose cup shaped leaves produce a unique type of gas. This gas affects the user’s hormonal balance and thus increases the amount of norepinephrine in the blood. The intense increase in this hormone makes user more aggressive, resilient, and more willing to conquer any obstacle. However, this change in hormonal balance also causes an increase in the size of cardiac muscles and impairs the activity of adrenal glands. Another negative quality of this artifact is that it produces a very high amount of radiation.
Sandstone

This artifact can isolate heat from any object it touches. A user who holds this artifact can avoid getting burned in areas where the temperature reaches up to 300 degrees Celsius. On top of this, the artifact also has a small healing effect. The shape of the artifact is a sphere which is hollow in certain places. The surface of this sphere is covered by an unknown substance which holds the entire artifact together.
Seraph

A very rare, organic artifact which consist of vitamins and amino acids who for an unknown reason have the ability to penetrate the user’s body. It uplifts the general well-being of any nearby organism and improves their metabolism. Because of the improvement in metabolic functions, its user can gain muscle a lot faster.
Miser’s Skull

This sphere shaped artifact is very interesting due to its very high content of hydrochloric magnesium, which can halt and in some cases stop chemical reactions. This artifact is completely non-radioactive which makes very valuable to both stalkers and outside buyers.
Joint

This artifact looks and feels like a regular stone, and yet it’s a very high source of radiation, and for that same reason it isn’t that popular with stalkers. Instead the artifact is of great interest to scientist because of the psy-field it generates which improves muscle functions. The artifact can make its user carry an extra 25 kg.
Kislushka

One of the most visually stunning artifacts in the Zone. So many people want it just for its beauty. The artifact is made out of a hollow transparent sphere, and inside there are emerald sources of light. The artifact is also popular among stalkers because of its healing properties. Its only downside is that it’s radioactive.
Grape

This artifact is a melted piece resin with a green shade. It acts like a “black hole” for radiation and it rids its user of it in a matter of minutes. It’s a real eliminator of radiation to say the least.
